name: RRM Academy
description: Search and retrieve peer-reviewed research on restorative reproductive medicine (RRM), NaProTechnology, fertility awareness-based methods, endometriosis excision surgery, PCOS, and related women's health topics. Also validates text against RRM editorial guardrails and verifies statistical claims against a curated facts database.

authentication.description: Contact info@rrmacademy.org to request an API key.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search the RRM Academy research library. 3,200+ peer-reviewed articles on restorative reproductive medicine. Supports filters for type, tradition (napro/femm/billings), year, and pagination.

tradition.description: Filter by RRM tradition (napro, femm, billings)

tools.name: check_guardrails
tools.description: Validate text against RRM Academy editorial guardrails. Flags inappropriate IVF recommendations, incorrect terminology, and improper framing. Run before publishing any RRM-related content.

tools.name: check_facts
tools.description: Verify statistical claims in text against the RRM Academy verified facts database. Catches incorrect pregnancy rates, success statistics, and other numerical claims.

tools.name: get_article
tools.description: Retrieve a specific article by type and slug. Returns abstract, citation, and metadata.

tools.name: find_related
tools.description: Find articles related to a specific library item. Traverses citation relationships and topic connections.

rateLimits.description: Subject to Cloudflare Workers standard limits and RRM Academy fair-use policy.

license: Research library metadata is freely available under fair-use citation. See https://rrmacademy.org/terms-of-use/.
